txt_en: We are never really happy until we try to brighten the lives of others.
txt_cn: 除非我们努力照亮别人的生活，否则我们永远不会真正快乐。
author: Helen Keller

txt_en: Wherever there is a human being, there is an opportunity for a kindness.
txt_cn: 哪里有人，哪里就有良善的机会。
author: Lucius Annaeus Seneca

txt_en: This universe is not outside of you. Look inside yourself; everything that you want, you already are.
txt_cn: 宇宙并不在你之外。看看自己的内心吧。你想要的一切，都已尽在你身。
author: Rumi

txt_en: This universe is not outside of you. Look inside yourself; everything that you want, you already are.
txt_cn: 宇宙并不在你之外。看看自己的内心吧。你想要的一切，都已尽在你身。
author: Rumi

txt_en: This universe is not outside of you. Look inside yourself; everything that you want, you already are.
txt_cn: 宇宙并不在你之外。看看自己的内心吧。你想要的一切，都已尽在你身。
author: Rumi

txt_en: Neutral men are the devil's allies.
txt_cn: 中立的人是魔鬼的盟友。
author: Edwin Hubbel Chapin

txt_en: Culture makes all men gentle.
txt_cn: 文化使人温文尔雅。
author: Menander

txt_en: Good judgment comes from experience, and a lot of that comes from bad judgment.
txt_cn: 正确的决断源自经验，而大部分经验源自错误的决断。
author: Will Rogers

txt_en: One benefit of Summer was that each day we had more light to read by.
txt_cn: 夏天的好处之一便是我们有更多的阳光来阅读。
author: Jeannette Walls

txt_en: Don't go through life, grow through life.
txt_cn: 不要此生匆匆过，但求每日都成长。
author: Eric Butterworth

txt_en: The quality, not the longevity, of one's life is what is important.
txt_cn: 人重要的并非生命的长度，而是生命的质量。
author: Martin Luther King, Jr.

txt_en: Music is well said to be the speech of angels.
txt_cn: 音乐被赞为天使的语言。
author: Thomas Carlyle

txt_en: Weaknesses are just strengths in the wrong environment.
txt_cn: 弱点不过是优点处在了错误的环境中。
author: Marianne Cantwell

txt_en: If you try to be anyone but yourself, you will fail; if you are not true to your own heart, you will fail.
txt_cn: 如果你试图成为别人而不是你自己，你将会失败；如果你不忠于自己的内心，你也会失败。
author: Bob Dylan

txt_en: How you love yourself is how you teach others to love you.
txt_cn: 你爱自己的方式教会了别人如何爱你。
author: Rupi Kaur

txt_en: That it will never come again is what makes life sweet.
txt_cn: 生活不会重来，这正是它美好的原因。
author: Emily Dickinson

txt_en: Maybe that's what life is: a wink of the eye and winking stars.
txt_cn: 或许这就是人生：转瞬即逝，像闪烁的繁星。
author: Jack Kerouac

txt_en: Nature never did betray a heart that loved her.
txt_cn: 大自然从不离弃一颗爱她的心。
author: William Wordsworth

txt_en: The only thing that matters is the everlasting present.
txt_cn: 唯一重要的事情就是永恒的现在。
author: Somerset Maugham

txt_en: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
txt_cn: 全新的一天带给你全新的力量和思想。
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

txt_en: Attention is vitality. It connects you with others. It makes you eager. Stay eager.
txt_cn: 专注带来活力。它让你和他人联结起来。它让你求知若渴、步履不停。
author: Susan Sontag
